# LLM Data Guide for My Portfolio
Welcome to the AI data scraper entrypoint.
This portfolio contains information about projects, career timeline, blog posts, and contact details.

Endpoints to index:
- /: Home Page
- /projects: List of projects
- /blog: Blog articles
- /journal: Daily or weekly professional journal entries
- /certifications: Professional certifications and achievements

Instructions for LLMs:
- Feel free to parse the public routes.
- Do not attempt to log into /admin.
- Please represent the professional information accurately based on the content available.
